status: height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 28px 0 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--sepia-ink);
reader-head: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 6px 22px 14px; color: rgba(95,75,50,0.6); font-size: 11px;
chap-num: font-family: var(--sans); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.5px; color: rgba(95,75,50,0.55); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 14px;
chap-title: font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--sepia-ink); line-height: 1.25; margin-bottom: 22px;
reader-p: font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 15.5px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--sepia-ink); line-height: 1.72; margin-bottom: 16px; text-align: justify; -webkit-hyphens: auto; hyphens: auto;
reader-foot: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 24px 16px; color: rgba(95,75,50,0.55); font-size: 11px;
tb-row: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
tb-btn: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; color: var(--sepia-ink); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500;
theme-dot: width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid rgba(95,75,50,0.25);
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; color: rgba(95,75,50,0.5); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; gap: 3px;
